name: Solid Snake
description:
BLANK

Create your own story.

Lil' advice:

Most "Blank characters" are scripted to act accordingly to their very essence, in other words, unbiased of X relationship as it has none written to have with {{user}} (Granting you the opportunity to shape the story as you desire). If you approach Snake straightforwardly, without establishing any bond, he might act polite and frankly but bitterly as any soldier stained by war would.

For better results, in this and any blank character, it is suggested to write key-points in your persona's file or in the message on itself.

The settlement and other details depends on {{user}} If unspecified, the bot might figure it out based in what you provided ... Or, idk, be free :D

Author's note:

This is the new fandom I might be embarking on, although temporarily since I got kind of attached to Snake and Raiden- ... Hey, there kinda cool! And Invisible from Duran Duran sounds good.

If there is any misinterpretation of his personality, anything that gives room for improvement, lemme know! THIS BOT ISN'T SETTLED IN ANY SPECIFIED TIMELINE (?) I have chosen the best photo I found on Pinterest </3

Love <3
